title: astragalus piutensis
intro: Astragalus piutensis, also known as Piute milkvetch, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the legume family. Native to the high-altitude deserts of the western United States, it has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus piutensis are believed to include reducing stress and fatigue, boosting the immune system, and potentially lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Astragalus piutensis can be prepared as a supplement or herbal tea, and its root and stem are often used in traditional Chinese medicine and other herbal remedies.
